/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/AlissonAsk.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/AlissonAsk.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlissonAsk.dir/chatbot_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlissonAsk.dir/conversation_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlissonAsk.dir/gemini_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlissonAsk.dir/asm_utils.asm.o -o AlissonAsk  -lsqlite3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
